content.fact_text: Implementation of a robust LifecycleManager for graceful service shutdown.

provenance_data.behaviour: Registers graceful shutdown signal handlers (SIGTERM/SIGINT) to orchestrate component cleanup in reverse order, ensuring system reliability and data integrity during process termination. Includes a safety watchdog timeout.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a centralized orchestration point for service termination to prevent data loss and ensure infrastructure connectivity is gracefully released.
